note: Raw JSON output from the deep-research workflow (Task wqvxprm18). 98 agent calls, 5 phases (Scope → Search → Fetch → Verify → Synthesize), 16 sources fetched, 59 claims extracted, 25 verified, 19 confirmed, 6 refuted.
